creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm really close to fixing openjdk7 with new locales, but I'm stuck now.

The current version of my patch is here:
https://www.dragonflybsd.org/~marino/patch-fix-openjdk7-locales.txt

There are multiple issues.  The first one is locale handling isn't tailored for BSD.  This patch fixes that, but it wasn't the primary issue.  I added debug code hashtable code, built jfreechart with the modified openjdk7 and got this:

Error occurred during initialization of VM
java.lang.NullPointerException: key is java.io.tmpdir
        at java.util.Hashtable.put(Hashtable.java:514)
        at java.lang.System.initProperties(Native Method)
        at java.lang.System.initializeSystemClass(System.java:1119)


So it's "java.io.tmpdir" that is null.  Notice in my patch I haves:
props.tmp_dir = "/var/tmp";

This should have guaranteed that java.io.tmpdir is always defined, but the error persists.  I haven't been able to find where else java.io.tmpdir could be null at initialization.

Help would be appreciated, I'm a bit stuck at the moment.
